verdict_notes: resolution_rate = 1.8%  [>3σ CRN-paired bias-vs-blueprint on 4/220 pairs; high => M adequate to detect bias effects].
differentiation_rate = 100.0%  [among resolved pairs, BR picks a non-blueprint bias; high => BR selects biases that beat the blueprint].
frac_br_selects_nonblueprint = 28.6%  [legacy all-pairs metric; reported for continuity, no longer the gate driver].

LOW RESOLUTION: M is too small to detect bias effects at these leaves (most pairs tie within MC noise). A measurement-budget limit, NOT an architecture failure — re-run at higher M (and/or more leaves) before any architectural conclusion. Projected M for the median near-resolved pair to clear 3σ: ~31 (median 1.52σ at M=8).

m_projection.note: median near-resolved pair is at 1.52σ at M=8; ~M=31 projected to clear 3σ (stderr ~ 1/sqrt(M)).
